label: SEC companyfacts API
assessment: Downloaded AMZN, MSFT, GOOGL and ORCL JSON files; useful for official filing discovery and consolidated XBRL facts, not sufficient as a replacement cloud-segment quarterly dataset.

label: SEC Financial Statement Data Sets
assessment: Official quarterly downloadable ZIPs provide XBRL face financial statement data from SEC filings; useful for auxiliary consolidated-statement checks, but not a replacement for cloud segment/product-line extraction.

label: HKEX Historical Data Products - corporate documents
assessment: HKEX corporate-document archives can be purchased and downloaded, but they are document archives rather than a structured audited operating-metric dataset.

label: FinancialReports.eu public-company filing index
assessment: Broad filing index with web/API/S3 access; useful as filing discovery, but not accepted as a formal replacement metric source because target values still require official row-level extraction and verification.

label: Finnhub global company financials API
assessment: Potential screening API; rejected as formal replacement because it requires API access and does not preserve the project audit schema by default.

label: DATA.GOV.HK OFCA provider datasets
assessment: Official government datasets; already adapted in the CMHK macro-policy package.

label: Hong Kong Telecommunications Indicators
assessment: Official OFCA telecommunications indicators, update frequency yearly, with CSV/data-dictionary/source links.

label: Cloud Service Providers Financials - Kaggle
assessment: Not accepted as a replacement formal source because accessible metadata does not provide official row-level verification controls.

label: Big Tech - Cloud Business Revenue - MacroMicro
assessment: Not accepted as a replacement formal source; may be used only as a public comparison lead after official verification.
